checks.label: TEE Implementation
checks.command: (gk=$(getprop ro.hardware.gatekeeper 2>/dev/null); ks=$(getprop ro.hardware.keystore 2>/dev/null); wv=$(getprop ro.hardware.weaver 2>/dev/null); sb=$(pm list features 2>/dev/null | grep -i strongbox); km=$(service list 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'keymint|keymaster' | head -1); out=''; [ -n "$wv" ] && out="weaver=$wv "; [ -n "$sb" ] && out="${out}strongbox=present "; [ -n "$km" ] && out="${out}keymint_or_keymaster=present "; [ -n "$gk" ] && [ "$gk" != 'default' ] && [ "$gk" != 'software' ] && out="${out}gatekeeper=$gk "; [ -n "$ks" ] && [ "$ks" != 'default' ] && [ "$ks" != 'software' ] && out="${out}keystore=$ks "; echo ${out:-NOT_FOUND})
checks.description: PCI-DSS: TEE/hardware-backed key storage required for payment operations. Checks gatekeeper, keystore, weaver props + StrongBox feature + KeyMint/Keymaster service. Outputs detected signals or NOT_FOUND. Skips 'default'/'software' (pure SW fallback).

checks.label: Secure Element HAL
checks.description: Secure Element HAL libraries for hardware security module access

checks.label: Keymaster HAL Version
checks.description: Keymaster HAL version - higher versions have better security features

checks.label: Kiosk Mode (Lock Task)
checks.command: result=$(timeout 10 dumpsys activity activities 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'mLockTaskModeState|mLockTaskMode[^S]' | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1); echo "${result:-0}"
checks.description: POS should run in kiosk/lock task mode (1=locked, 2=pinned). Supports both old (mLockTaskModeState) and new (mLockTaskMode) Android property names. Returns 0 if not in kiosk mode.

checks.label: App Pinning Enabled
checks.description: App pinning should be enabled for single-app POS kiosk mode

checks.label: Payment Apps Installed
checks.description: Count of payment-related applications installed

checks.label: Payment App Permissions
checks.command: PKGS=$(pm list packages 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'pay|wallet|pos|terminal' | cut -d: -f2 | head -3 | tr '\n' '|' | sed 's/|$//'); [ -n "$PKGS" ] && dumpsys package 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Package \\[($PKGS)\\]" -A 100 | grep -E 'permission.*INTERNET|permission.*NFC|permission.*CAMERA' | head -15 || echo ''
checks.description: Review critical permissions granted to payment apps - INTERNET+NFC+CAMERA combo needs manual review

checks.label: Dangerous Permission - CAMERA
checks.command: dumpsys package 2>/dev/null | grep -B20 'android.permission.CAMERA.*granted=true' | grep 'Package \[' | sed 's/.*Package \[//;s/\].*//' | sort -u | grep -ivE 'camera|photo|scan|barcode|qr' | head -5
checks.description: Non-camera apps with CAMERA permission - potential card skimming risk

checks.label: Open Listening Ports
checks.command: (netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null || ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null) | grep -E 'LISTEN' | awk '{print $4}' | grep -oE '[0-9]+$' | sort -u | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'
checks.description: PCI-DSS 1.1.6: Review all listening ports on POS terminal

checks.label: Remote Desktop Ports
checks.description: PCI-DSS 2.2.7: RDP(:3389)/VNC(:5900-5901,:5800)/SSH(:22)/ADB-net(:5555) must be closed. :4444 included as Metasploit/reverse-shell indicator - verify manually if flagged.

checks.label: Suspicious Processes - Memory Tools
checks.command: ps -A -o cmd 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\bmemdump\b|\bmemscrap\b|\btcpdump\b|\bstrace\b|\bltrace\b' | grep -ivE 'dumpstate|dumpsys|dumpcrash|tombstoned|incidentd' | grep -v grep
checks.description: Memory dumping tools detected - potential RAM scraping malware indicator

checks.label: Suspicious Processes - Known POS Malware
checks.description: Known POS malware process names detected

checks.label: Hotspot Disabled
checks.description: PCI-DSS: WiFi hotspot must be disabled on POS terminals

checks.label: Clipboard Manager Apps
checks.description: Third-party clipboard apps may capture card data

checks.label: Screen Capture Disabled
checks.description: Screen capture should be disabled to protect card data display

checks.label: POS Vendor Properties
checks.description: POS vendor-specific system properties detected

checks.label: Log Files with Card Patterns
checks.description: PCI-DSS 3.4: Files potentially containing standalone PANs (Visa/MC/Amex/Discover). Uses digit-boundary matching to reduce false positives from serial numbers and IDs.

checks.label: Debug Log Level
checks.description: Verbose logging may expose sensitive payment data in logs

checks.label: Logcat Buffer Size
checks.description: Large log buffers may retain sensitive transaction data longer

checks.label: PAN Data in SQLite Databases
checks.description: PCI-DSS 3.4: SQLite databases containing unencrypted PAN card data. Uses sqlite3 .dump (text output) instead of raw strings to avoid binary false positives.

checks.label: Screen Recording Process Active
checks.description: Screen recording tool detected - may capture card data or PIN entry on POS terminal
